title: SuperEnchants
description: Premium custom enchant progression with 50+ enchants, rerollable books, combine/upgrades, GUI shop, and high-impact combat & mining effects.
body:
# SuperEnchants

**SuperEnchants** gives your server a premium enchant progression loop players can grind, collect, reroll, and optimize.

It packs 50+ custom enchants across combat, mining, armor, bows, and utility, then layers combine systems, shop flow, extraction, discovery tracking, and visible gameplay impact on top.

## New in 1.1.0
- Added `/senchant reroll <category|any>` for same-rarity enchant book rerolls
- Added `/senchant progress [player]` with rarity + category completion stats
- Discovery Journal now shows stronger completion breakdowns
- Cleaned up command/runtime/build issues and rebuilt the project source cleanly

## Why It Gets Downloads
- 50+ enchants with real impact in PvP, PvE, mining, and movement
- Premium-feel progression through combine, extract, reroll, shop, and journal systems
- Strong replay loop for SMP, RPG, prison, and progression-heavy servers
- Easy-to-understand commands and GUI flow for players

## Core Systems
- Weapon, armor, tool, and bow enchant families
- Combine GUI with success chance + XP cost
- Enchant shop GUI with rarity-based pricing
- Extraction system that turns enchants back into books
- Discovery Journal that tracks what players have found
- Reroll system for fixing bad luck on high-rarity books
- Natural loot + villager trade integration

## Main Commands
- `/senchant combine`
- `/senchant shop`
- `/senchant extract <highest|all>`
- `/senchant reroll <category|any>`
- `/senchant journal`
- `/senchant progress [player]`
- `/senchant info <enchant>`

## Best Fit
- Survival SMP
- RPG / adventure servers
- Prison / progression-heavy servers
- Communities that like loot chase and long-term upgrade loops

## Support The Project
If SuperEnchants helps your server grow, support future updates:
- [Buy Me a Coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/perusi)

SuperEnchants adds the kind of premium enchant economy and item chase that keeps players grinding for the next upgrade.
